The irradiations of the samples were carried out within
and without a cylindrical cadmium shield case. The
irradiations for eight samples for each element, which
are individually prepared from the fresh stocks, were
repeated four time, that is, a set of four, with and
without Cd-irradiation data for MnO(2), Ga(2)O(3),
As(2)O(3) are obtained. The samples were diluted to
minimize self-shielding during irradiation. For this,
the samples were mechanically mixed with finely grained

The irradiation times for the (n,gamma) reactions of
Mn-55, Ga-71, As-75 were chosen for a period of
3-6 half-lives, yielding enough activity to be measured
